title: My Favorite City
content: After visiting many destinations, Lily still considered Prague her favorite city. She loved the historic architecture, charming streets, and peaceful atmosphere. Every corner seemed to reveal another beautiful building or hidden café. She enjoyed crossing old bridges, exploring local markets, and watching the sunset from scenic viewpoints. Unlike some larger cities, Prague felt easy to explore on foot. Whenever Lily looked at photos from the trip, she remembered how comfortable and welcoming the city had felt. She hoped to return one day and discover even more.
